text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm taking a stroll<n>through the
streets...

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black A
text_block_list.text: ...Over here. Hurry.

text_block_list.name: Woman in Tuxedo
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen! I cordially<n>welcome you to
our casino<n>tournament! The stakes—nothing but
your dignity as a high roller! Compete<n>to your
heart's content, for today and<n>today only! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for cryin' out loud. I thought I saw<n>a fish outta
water, and here you are<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Before you get any funny ideas, this<n>tournament is
completely legit, all<n>right? Despite the unregistered
busybodies stickin' their noses in.

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text:
Pssst! Look, it's her... The legendary<n>dealer—the
Angel of the Night! Oh, I<n>can't believe I get to see
her in<n>person!
choice_data_list: Isn't that the woman we ran into by the river?

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my. Who do we have here? Hehe.<n>Long time
no see.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Well, well, well. Looks like YourHoliness is pretty popular.

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, and I've chosen you as my<n>opponent.
What do you say? Care to<n>put your pride on the
line?

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: No way! An opponent handpicked bythe Angel herself? Who is that?Snicker. Nobody beats the Angel...

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
The name of the game is five-card<n>draw. You can
pick your chips up at<n>reception. The rules are
standard, for<n>the most part.

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text: There is one twist, however. Theloser has to provide a... tip, shall wesay, for flushes and higher.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
So you're sayin' if someone plays a<n>full house or
a four of a kind, the<n>other player has to cough up
more<n>dough outside of the pot?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Trainer. Watch my back, would<n>ya? I don't
need any lookie-loos<n>peekin' at my cards.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thus begins the poker match. The<n>first round goes
to Nakayama Festa<n>with a pair of kings. The
second ends<n>in a draw, followed by another round
for Nakayama in the third bout.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Without a doubt, Nakayama Festa has<n>luck on her
side. The fourth round<n>commences with her
opponent's<n>chips greatly diminished. Then, an
even better opportunity arises...

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text: ...I call. And you?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...I got nothin'. I fold. Gimme a sec. I<n>need some
fresh air.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
We just finished the deck, right?<n>Make sure ya
shuffle it while I'm<n>gone.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Phew...
choice_data_list: But you had three of a kind...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Show one, show all. Even if the<n>hand's finished,
don't go around<n>revealing the cards.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Besides, she had at least a flush. I'd<n>have been
forced into payin' that<n>so-called "tip" if I'd stayed
in.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That's my hunch, at least. More<n>importantly, I
wanted to get the deck<n>shuffled.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
We discarded our hands every round<n>and were
dealt cards from the same<n>deck. In other words,
we could count<n>the cards.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It's a way of figurin' out what cards<n>are left in the
deck. She made me<n>reveal my cards after every
round,<n>remember? However...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Now that I've made her shuffle theentire deck, all the knowledge of pastcards she saved up has gone downthe drain. Maybe it's time I took that "insane luck" for a spin.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, whaddya say we go for broke?<n>Don't even
worry about the<n>difference in chips. All or nothin'.

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
What?! You're willing to throw away<n>your lead? If
that's how you want to<n>play... I may just have to
take you up<n>on that!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Be my guest. My shoulders arecrampin' up in anticipation... I don'twanna settle for anything safe—I'mhungry for the win.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Now, Dealer. I want to draw one card,but... I'm going to choose whichone.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa closes her eyes and<n>points to a
single card in the deck.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's the spitting image of Special<n>Week during
the Tracen<n>Concentration Card Game Tourney.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Shortly afterward, the venue is abuzz<n>with talk of
how an unnamed<n>Umamusume defeated the
legendary<n>dealer with a straight flush.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After which, fresh off of her victory,<n>she promptly
disappeared from the<n>premises without playing
anyone<n>else.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Days later, I spot Nakayama Festa at<n>the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you. Sorry to leave you in the<n>thick of it the
other day, but ya can't<n>blame anyone for wantin'
to get<n>away from all that commotion.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't after fame, after all. I just<n>wanted a
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I notice there's a bus parked up<n>ahead of her.
Come to think of it, the<n>morning news said that
she's racing<n>today.
choice_data_list: On your way to the next challenge?
On your way to the next challenge?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Looks like it's gonna be a bit of<n>a pain...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Still, you'd better watch.<n>You're in for a
show.
